headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on JM Smucker, Lowers Price Target to $125
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains JM Smucker (NYSE:SJM) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $135 to $125.
